title: Opinion: Opinion | Gasping In 4 Days? How Iran Humbled US-Israel's Million-Dollar War Inventory
summary_full: In the ongoing war, in just four days of battle, there are fears that the US and Israel's inventory of Patriot and Tomahawk missiles may run out soon.
